The Residence

A contemporary four-bedroom villa set within the Meliá-managed grounds of San Pietro Resort at Gjiri i Lalzit. Full-height glazing opens the living level to a private pool and garden, while the first floor gathers the bedrooms around a sea-facing veranda. Delivered turnkey and fully titled — on the villa and its land alike.
